name: chainlink-builder-lab-vadodara
description: A beginner-friendly Chainlink workshop repository for Vadodara builders.

scripts.track1: cross-env TRACK=track-1 hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.track2: cross-env TRACK=track-2 hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.track3-sepolia: cross-env TRACK=track-3 hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.track3-fuji: cross-env TRACK=track-3 hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network avalancheFuji
scripts.track4: cross-env TRACK=track-4 hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
